# /implement

> Drive implementation. Emits PBIT (dataset + report template), PBIX exports, dataflow JSON, CE SSRS RDL files, RLS role definitions, and theme JSON under `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/output/`.

## Usage

```
/implement [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--task <slug>] [--complete]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/tasks/*.task.md` (`TASK_VALIDATED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/reporting/tdd.md`
- `project.config.yaml reporting.*`

## Execution flow

1. Build dependency DAG; topologically sort (sources → dataflows → datasets → reports → dashboards → apps).
2. For each task:
   - Generate / modify dataflow Power Query M code
   - Generate / modify dataset TMDL (Tabular Model Definition Language) or via Tabular Editor JSON
   - Generate / modify report PBIR / PBIT
   - Generate / modify RDL XML (CE SSRS)
   - Generate / modify RLS role definitions
   - Write artefacts under `output/{layer}/{name}.{ext}`
   - Update task `implementation-status: done`
3. On `--complete`:
   - Run dataset best-practice rules (Power BI Analyzer; data-types, hidden cols, calc-group hygiene)
   - Validate `unit-test` policy
   - `currentStates += IMPLEMENTED`

## Output

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/output/**`
- Task cards updated
